payload.text:
Usage: /aincr <key> [amount]

Atomically increment a counter using Redis HINCRBY. Amount defaults to 1.

Usage: /areset <key> [value]

Atomically reset a counter using Redis HSET. Value defaults to 0.

name: /aincr with key but no Redis responds with error

payload.text: Redis is not configured. Set REDIS_URL to enable atomic counters.

name: /areset with key but no Redis responds with error

payload.text: Redis is not configured. Set REDIS_URL to enable atomic counters.
